title: Washington on Edge as Week Brings an Array of Economic Data and a Royal Visit
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Washington is tense due to upcoming economic data releases and a royal visit amidst ongoing political and international tensions. The week includes critical dec
excerpt: Washington is tense due to upcoming economic data releases and a royal visit amidst ongoing political and international tensions. The week includes critical decisions on interest rates and funding. The situation remains volatile.

content.introduction: Washington is tense due to upcoming economic data releases and a royal visit amidst ongoing political and international tensions. The week includes critical decisions on interest rates and funding. The situation remains volatile.
body: Washington on Edge as Week Brings an Array of Economic Data and a Royal Visit https://lnkd.in/e46xdNW4.

Meanwhile, Congress will have a busy agenda trying to resolve outstanding funding for the Department of Homeland Security, now taking on even more urgency since the [attempted assasination attempt](https://www.usnews.com/news/politics/articles/2026-04-26/what-happened-inside-the-ballroom-when-a-gunman-tried-to-breach-trumps-night-with-the-press) on President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner Saturday night. And still the war in Iran continues, with talks between the U.S. and the Islamic republic on hold, and the critical [Strait of Hormuz](https://www.usnews.com/news/world/articles/2026-04-27/shipping-traffic-through-hormuz-remains-muted-with-no-us-iran-deal-in-sight-data-shows) closed to most ship traffic. That would go a long way to settling the economic narrative as businesses continue to invest heavily in productivity-enhancing technology, consumers still are [spending](https://www.usnews.com/news/national-news/articles/2026-04-21/retail-sales-rise-on-higher-gasoline-costs), and – while it is well above the Fed’s target levels – there are signs inflation has stabilized somewhat. Wednesday will be a key day, as the Fed issues its [interest rate decision](https://www.usnews.com/news/national-news/articles/2026-04-15/fed-finds-economic-uncertainty-from-iran-war) followed by Powell’s press conference. [Photos: Shooting at Washington Dinner](https://www.usnews.com/photos/2026/04/27/in-pictures-chaos-at-the-white-house-correspondents-association-dinner). Cecelia Smith-SchoenwalderApril 23, 2026](https://www.usnews.com/news/national-news/articles/2026-04-23/trump-administration-moves-to-reclassify-marijuana-as-schedule-iii-drug). Davi SchulmanApril 23, 2026](https://www.usnews.com/news/national-news/articles/the-10-countries-leading-the-way-on-climate-change). Cecelia Smith-SchoenwalderApril 23, 2026](https://www.usnews.com/news/politics/articles/trump-turnover-2-0-tracking-whos-out-of-trumps-second-term).
With major economic data on the horizon and a high-profile royal visit, it's a week that blends policy pressure with public attention in
